items.title: [Khukra Finance] Stabilize local dev (skip startup sync, single DuckDB writer)
items.body: API was crashing on catalog sync and DuckDB file locks. KHUKRA_SKIP_STARTUP_SYNC=1 added to start-dev.ps1. Monitor for recurring crashes.

items.title: [Khukra Finance] Switch DAX market data from Stooq to Yahoo Finance
items.body: Stooq returns HTML bot-check; refresh cached 0 symbols. Yahoo chart API works for .DE tickers.

items.title: [Khukra Finance] Full-universe refresh + 15y history cap
items.body: Refresh all symbols button, KHUKRA_MAX_HISTORY_YEARS=15, longer refresh timeout.

items.title: [Khukra Finance] Add macro regime data feeds (FRED/ECB + VSTOXX)
items.body: Suggested data source tier 1 for finance disruption/regime research. Free, high value for scenario labeling.

items.title: [Khukra Finance] Corporate actions for .DE backtests
items.body: Dividends/splits needed for correct total-return validation on German names.

items.title: [Khukra Finance] Expand universe beyond DAX 32 (MDAX / Euro Stoxx)
items.body: User asked about larger data swipe beyond current curated universe.

items.title: [Khukra] Scaffold disruption intelligence repo
items.body: Standalone repo with disruption/quality/resilience models, CLI, API, tests.

items.title: [Logistics] Disruption ingest + statistical discovery pipeline
items.body: FRED/Yahoo signals, refresh/discover/forecast CLI and API endpoints. Pearson/Spearman, regimes, lead-lag, composite risk.

items.title: [Logistics] Discovery cockpit UI
items.body: Browser board for catalog, refresh, insights, and composite risk charts (like Khukra finance cockpit).

items.title: [Logistics] Add port congestion + geopolitical event feeds
items.body: Next-tier disruption data sources for global risk analysis (structured feeds beyond RSS headlines).

items.title: [Logistics] Calibrate simulation model from discovered composite risk
items.body: Bridge empirical panel to disruption_risk_forecast instead of pure synthetic paths.

items.title: [Logistics] Push repos to GitHub + link Operations board
items.body: khukra (main), khukra-finance, and khukra-physics pushed to GitHub. Operations board lives in main Khukra repo.

items.title: [Ops] Maintain single Operations board (this manifest)
items.body: All agent suggestions go to board.manifest.json and sync to GitHub Project. Chat is not the tracker.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 1 — RSS judgment + VADER sentiment + news signals
items.body: Pipeline: RSS → objective judgment (logistics/shock/macro channels) → VADER NLP on retained headlines → tone-adjusted news_stress + daily news_sentiment. Discover insights: sentiment spike, most negative headline. Code: disruption/news/{judgment,sentiment,enrich,service}.py.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 2 — NER + entity extraction on retained headlines
items.body: Tag ports, canals (Suez/Panama), carriers, countries, commodities on judgment-filtered headlines. Emit entity columns in headline cache and optional daily entity-count signals (e.g. news_suez_mentions). CPU-only; spaCy small or gazetteer + rules. Plugs into enrich.py after judgment.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 2 — Event typing (strike, closure, cyber, sanction, weather, bankruptcy)
items.body: Classify retained headlines into disruption event types to replace/augment regex channel matching in judgment.py. Enables structured event stream and type-specific daily signals. Start with rules + keyword patterns; optional zero-shot classifier later.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 2 — Headline dedup (MinHash or embedding clusters)
items.body: Collapse near-duplicate titles across feeds before aggregating news_stress so one story does not inflate daily impact. MinHash for speed; optional MiniLM embeddings for semantic dupes. Apply between judgment and enrich.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 2 — Aspect / logistics-targeted sentiment
items.body: Score polarity toward freight/trade disruption, not generic headline tone. Fixes cases where VADER misreads logistics jargon or mixed macro+logistics stories. Output aspect_sentiment alongside VADER compound in enrich.py.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 3 — FinBERT or zero-shot relevance to augment judgment
items.body: Replace brittle relevance thresholds with domain-aware classifier (FinBERT fine-tune or BART-MNLI zero-shot on disruption objective). Keep rule-based judgment as fallback for explainability. Optional dep group in pyproject.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 3 — Embedding theme clustering + novelty detection
items.body: Sentence embeddings (e.g. all-MiniLM-L6-v2) on retained headlines: cluster themes, flag novel clusters vs 7-day baseline, feed Discover with theme summaries. Weekly rollups for sparse daily panels.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP Phase 4 — LLM structured event extraction + RAG analyst
items.body: Optional analyst surface: LLM extracts JSON events (who/what/where/severity) from title+summary; RAG over retained headline cache + macro panel for Q&A. Not required for core daily signals — ship only if chat copilot is a product goal.

items.title: [Logistics] NLP validation — lead-lag vs VIX/shipping_proxy for headline quality
items.body: Without labeled ground truth, validate NLP features by lead-lag and Bayesian correlation vs macro signals. Benchmark Phase 2+ changes against news_sentiment baseline. Add tests/notebook for regression on headline scoring.

items.title: [Logistics] North star — daily forecast precision scorecard (hybrid panel)
items.body: Forecast precision is the product goal. Hybrid macro+market+news panel evaluated daily: walk-forward MAE, direction hit rate, channel ablation, precision score 0-100, verdict. Auto-run on refresh/news. API: POST /evaluate, GET /evaluation. Serves as ground truth for whether analysis is right.

items.title: [Logistics] Hybrid data tier 1 — GSCPI + logistics RSS + shipping basket
items.body: Improve forecast precision by replacing low-relevance sources: NY Fed GSCPI, logistics-native RSS feeds, multi-name shipping basket. Success = daily precision_score trend up and news channel_lift positive.

items.title: [Logistics] Forecast model selection + weighted hybrid composite
items.body: Auto-pick Holt vs Bayesian linear on walk-forward MAE. Weight signals by predictive screen / channel ablation instead of equal-weight z-scores. Inverse-variance channel combine; news weight lowered to 8%. Success criterion: beats_holt true on daily evaluation.
